form.formComment: Continued winning form with another impressive display after leading to make it two in a row at this track over 515m (30.15). In hot form and expected to go close again.

form.formComment: Working her way into winning form after her success on March 14 at this track over 400m. Last start was second over 515m in 29.77, behind Zipping Maudie. Has claims if at her best.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened and severely checked through the 1st turn and lost ground.

form.formComment: Last start finished fourth over 515m at this track, beaten 6 lengths (30.40) behind Kalani Cruise in a Mix on April 10. Will be tested in this company.

form.formComment: Form has been strong with wins two and three starts back. Last time out finished 3rd in a Grade 5 on April 11 over 515m at this track behind Zipping Maudie beaten 2.75 lengths (29.96). Capable of playing a big role.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing 5th on April 11 over 400m at this track in a Grade 5. Happy enough to avoid.

form.formComment: Turned in a good run last time, placing (30.16) at Gosford in a Grade 5. Lines up from box 8 for the first time. Looks suited here and rates a leading chance.
